lines: Shall we tidy up the garden tools, {player}?
Many hands make the work fly by like a breeze.
Helping out makes the whole village happy, {player}!
no_quest_line: The village looks so neat because of you, {player}!
quest_offer_line: There's been a little mess in the square. Could you help me tidy it up, {player}?
quest_progress_line: A little bit here, a little bit there... You're a great helper, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Look how neat everything is! You're a true champion of chores, {player}.
